_doc: Hand-authored design-time (no-job) scenario. Only docsai ask is proxied; any other uip command returns an empty array.

rules._doc: Open-ended natural-language query; proxy to the real uip CLI per troubleshoot test rules.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting. This is a design-time issue — there is no Orchestrator job to query.
